name: AGIS Fleet Operating System
stateSource: Apps Script Processor and Google Sheets State DB
animationRule: No random completion motion; actor state derives from Processor request response and dashboard.state
legacyRpgOperationsRole: secondary visual reference only, not business logic
features: desktop and mobile responsive operations deck
Processor event bridge for job create route mission update and receipt creation
dashboard state synchronization on Processor response focus visibility and controlled polling
real crew states idle assigned working waiting blocked review handoff and done
crew movement to operational stations based on real mission ownership
blocked animation when Processor rejects a request or Evidence Gate fails
operational event timeline separate from team notes
verified experience derived only from done mission evidence and receipt
no simulated ETA or online status claims
mission control evidence gate receipt export and Drive handoff
offline cache for Active Operations runtime
